steps.title: Use reflective context
steps.content: Ezeulu considered the immensity of his power and wondered whether it was real. The context is careful thought that leads to doubt, not permission, respect, or expectation.

steps.title: Reject wrong meanings
steps.content: B means expected something future. C means permitted. D means held in high regard. The remaining word means thought about deeply and at length. The answer is A.
